problems.title: Insufficient job listings — only ~243 jobs vs thousands on source sites
problems.description: Sarkariresult.com and other sources have thousands of jobs. Our site has only ~243. Scraper is either being blocked, over-filtering via seen_items.json, or not paginating enough source pages.
actions: Check if seen_items.json (1104 entries) is blocking re-scrape of valid jobs
Verify CF Worker proxy is not rate-limiting or returning errors
Check scraper logs for block/403/captcha patterns
Ensure pagination is scraping beyond page 1 of source listings
Add freejobalert.com and rojgarresult.com as active secondary sources

problems.title: 404 pages on live site
problems.description: Pages are 404ing — either generateStaticParams is missing slugs, Cloudflare Pages routing is wrong, or MDX files exist but aren't being built into static pages.
actions: Audit generateStaticParams in app/jobs/[category]/[slug]/page.tsx
Verify dynamicParams = false is set — it is, which means unbuilt slugs 404
Check if all CATEGORIES in config/site.ts match actual content category folders
Verify Cloudflare Pages build output has all expected routes
Check next.config.js for correct output: 'export' config

problems.title: Pages not indexed by Google
problems.description: Job posting pages are not appearing in Google Search despite being live. Core indexing pipeline is broken.
actions: Verify /sitemap.xml is accessible and contains all job URLs
Check /robots.txt is not blocking Googlebot
Confirm canonical URLs in generateMetadata match actual page URLs exactly
Submit sitemap in Google Search Console
Check if noindex meta tag is accidentally present on job pages
Use URL Inspection in GSC to test individual job page crawlability

problems.title: Zero organic SEO traffic
problems.description: No organic search traffic. Site is invisible to search engines. Root causes are P001 (thin content) and P003 (indexing failure).
actions: Fix indexing issue first (P003) — traffic cannot come if pages aren't indexed
Fix content volume (P001) — more pages = more chances to rank
Audit title tags: must include job name + year + 'Apply Online' for search intent
Audit meta descriptions: must include vacancy count, last date, organization
Verify JobPosting structured data is valid via Google Rich Results Test
Build internal links: home -> category -> job detail
Add breadcrumbs with schema markup (already done — verify it's rendering)
Target long-tail keywords: '{exam name} 2026 apply online', '{org} recruitment 2026'

problems.title: Expired jobs showing as Active badge
problems.description: lastDate values with trailing text like '18/02/2026 upto 05 PM Only' broke date parsing via split('/'), returning Invalid Date and causing isExpired() to return false.
problems.fix: Rewrote parseDDMMYYYY() to use regex /(\ d{2})\/(\ d{2})\/(\ d{4})/ instead of split. Merged to main via PR #133.

problems.title: Google AdSense verification failing
problems.description: AdSense crawler does a static HTTP fetch and never sees scripts injected by JS. Next.js <Script strategy='afterInteractive'> is not in raw HTML source.
problems.fix: Replaced Next.js Script component with plain <script async> tag directly in <head> in app/layout.tsx. Merged to main via PR #134.
